description: Research/exploration mode: maximizes novelty retention via guaranteed density diversity
selection_rule: Divide candidates into 4 density quartiles; sample approximately n/4 from each quartile
rationale: Highest novelty retention (0.500) among all policies. Explicitly budgets 25% Q1 exposure, accepting ~6pp investigability cost versus C1. Suitable for discovery runs where finding structurally unusual hypotheses matters more than matching evaluation benchmarks.
use_when: Generating diverse hypothesis sets for qualitative review
